description.ko: 빛과 세포 구조가 무중력 환경에서 융합되는 유기적이고 호흡하는 생명체의 시각화.
description.en: A visualization of an organic, breathing life form where light and cellular structure merge in a weightless environment.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Luminescent Respiratory Weave.' A vast network of #7FB069 emerald moss membranes and #2D5A3D vascular filaments forming a giant, breathing lung. The structure is suspended in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent liquid, exhaling thick ribbons of #FFE66D golden liquid light that swirl like silk. Macro focus on the semi-permeable cellular walls revealing glowing internal sap channels. Rendered in Octane, 8k resolution, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh to capture a divine, breathing organic flow.
